topic: Photodynamic therapy: how light destroys cancer cells
caption: 💡 Did you know light can destroy cancer cells? Photodynamic therapy uses special light to kill cancer. Here's how: 🌟 1) A light-sensitive medication is applied. 🌈 2) It's activated by specific light wavelengths. 🔬 3) This combo creates oxygen that kills cancer cells. 💡 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. #PhotodynamicTherapy #CancerTreatment #LightTherapy #CancerResearch #MedicalBreakthroughs #HealthScience #CancerAwareness #Phototherapy
